title: WakeRequest (raft-channel-wake.v1)
description: The request body a Cat.B runtime adapter POSTs to /wake to bring an inbound CWS message into a bare runtime's visible context. This is the wire form of the fields the SDK-normalized InboundMessage carries; the adapter derives it from that message. `contentPreview` is a short, non-authoritative snippet for the wake notification — the runtime fetches full content via the SDK/services once awake. The SDK itself does not build this body (Cat.B delivery is adapter-owned behind InboundDelivery.deliver); this schema pins the contract both sides must agree on.
